title: The Longest Weekend
description: Based on a true story, a French film about a love that burns too bright and too hot.
quote: My darling, our love is too intense for us to be together for an extended period of time.
altHero: black and white shot, a man with a French mustache looks upset as a woman cries behind him on the beach
alt1: man and woman run toward each other
alt2: closeup of the man and woman talking
alt3: a red rose loses a petal
